name: insurance adjusters in mid-sized insurance firms processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters in mid-sized insurance firms processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient follow-up processes cause delayed claim resolutions. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking and scheduling via spreadsheets.
target_audience: insurance adjusters in mid-sized insurance firms processing 10–20 claims/month
problem_solved: inefficient follow-up processes for insurance claims
features: simple dashboard for tracking claims status
manual entry option for claims details
